methodological_reason: H4/D1 closure exists with decisions {'exclude_from_phase25_rules': 27, 'keep_as_ambiguous_example': 10, 'keep_as_negative_example': 9, 'keep_as_good_example': 8}. It is the cleanest visual scale.
risk_if_used_wrong: Using downgraded or ambiguous H4 counts as clean rules.
required_next_step: Use only keep/good or explicit ambiguous labels in guided search.

methodological_reason: Useful for substructure and failure-bank, but less stable than H4/D1.
risk_if_used_wrong: Promoting low timeframe microstructure to primary Elliott structure.

methodological_reason: Manual review found many micro/lateral cases. It is useful mainly to expose failure modes.
risk_if_used_wrong: Over-reading small noisy swings as full Elliott waves.
required_next_step: Use for diagnostics, not for Phase 2.5 primary rules.

methodological_reason: Degree calibration selected intermediate as best compromise, especially on H4/D1.
risk_if_used_wrong: Treating it as exact objective Elliott degree rather than visual scale.
required_next_step: Use as default degree in Phase 2.5 prototype.

methodological_reason: Major is useful as context, but degree overlap remains {'minor_substructure_only': 14, 'intermediate_primary_candidate': 14, 'degree_too_micro': 10, 'degree_not_discriminative': 7, 'major_context': 6, 'major_operable_higher_degree': 3}.
risk_if_used_wrong: Assuming every major count is more valid than intermediate by construction.
required_next_step: Use as context or higher-degree candidate with explicit label.

methodological_reason: Often too micro for principal Elliott count, though it can show internal waves.
risk_if_used_wrong: Letting minor dominate the main WaveCount state.
required_next_step: Keep as substructure with microstructure warning.

methodological_reason: Clean/defensible impulses are the strongest WaveCount input after visual closure.
risk_if_used_wrong: Turning visual quality into profitability claim or signal.
required_next_step: Feed to Phase 2.5 as candidate structure, not trade signal.

methodological_reason: Wave 5 diagnostics diagnosed 42 candidates and showed endpoint uncertainty should not invalidate aggressively.
risk_if_used_wrong: Closing wave 5 too early or invalidating good subwaves too aggressively.
required_next_step: Carry endpoint uncertainty and higher-degree subwave labels.

methodological_reason: Partial audit diagnosed 24 candidates; partials must stay provisional.
risk_if_used_wrong: Treating three alternating swings as a complete impulse or entry signal.
required_next_step: Require wave-3 displacement and post-3 diagnostics in Phase 2.5.

methodological_reason: It captures whether a local impulse may continue or belong to a higher-degree wave.
risk_if_used_wrong: Reading uncertainty as failure instead of provisionality.
required_next_step: Keep as diagnostic label, not hard invalidation.

methodological_reason: Visual ABC quality alone gave {'exclude_from_phase25': 1, 'keep_experimental': 1, 'usable_as_soft_context': 1, 'usable_only_manual_review': 1, 'overall_decision': 1}; isolated ABC is insufficient.
risk_if_used_wrong: Accepting a clean 0-A-B-C as correction without knowing what it corrects.
required_next_step: Use only after contextual correction policy.

methodological_reason: Contextual correction policy produced {'exclude_not_correction': 12, 'manual_contextual_review_only': 8, 'experimental_unknown_parent': 5, 'usable_contextual_correction': 4}; only parent/context-supported corrections are usable.
risk_if_used_wrong: Letting context rescue visually bad ABC or treating unknown-parent ABC as rules.
required_next_step: Require parent/context field before any Phase 2.5 use.

methodological_reason: EMAs help regime, transition and ambiguity; price inside band should raise ambiguity.
risk_if_used_wrong: Using EMA alignment as hard acceptance/rejection of counts.
required_next_step: Use as score/penalty, never as standalone validation.

methodological_reason: EWO helps wave-role interpretation: wave 3 expansion, wave 5 loss/divergence, corrections.
risk_if_used_wrong: Treating EWO as signal or forcing labels from oscillator shape.
required_next_step: Use as explanatory feature, not hard rule.

methodological_reason: D1 helps distinguish impulse, correction and transition, but can lag.
risk_if_used_wrong: Using HTF to rescue downgraded counts or reject valid transitions.
required_next_step: Use conflict labels: transition, explainable conflict, suspicious conflict.

methodological_reason: Alternation is meaningful only when wave 2 and wave 4 are both contextualized.
risk_if_used_wrong: Applying alternation without confirmed comparable corrections.
required_next_step: Leave as note until correction model is redesigned.

methodological_reason: Zigzag/flat/triangle/combination taxonomy is not implemented yet.
risk_if_used_wrong: Pretending simple ABC covers all Elliott corrections.
required_next_step: Separate redesign after Phase 2.5 prototype if needed.
